A

Accessory - Klasse in model.items.equipments
Represents an accessory item that can be equipped by the player.
Accessory(String, String, String, Itemtype, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse model.items.equipments.Accessory
Creates a new accessory item with the specified properties and defense value.
ACCESSORY - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.items.equipments.EquipmentSlot
Slot for accessories such as rings or amulets.
ACCESSORY - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.items.Itemtype
Miscellaneous equipment such as rings or trinkets.
addCard(JPanel, String) - Methode in Klasse view.GameFrame
Adds a new screen to the CardLayout container.
addExit(Exit) - Methode in Klasse model.dungeon.Room
Adds an exit to this room.
addItem(Item, int) - Methode in Klasse model.items.Inventory
Adds a specified amount of an item to the inventory.
addNotify() - Methode in Klasse view.GameFrame
Requests keyboard focus after the frame has been added to the native window system.
apply(Entity) - Methode in Schnittstelle model.items.effects.Effect
Applies this effect to the specified target entity.
apply(Entity) - Methode in Klasse model.items.effects.HealEffect
Applies this healing effect to the specified entity.
Armor - Klasse in model.items.equipments
Represents an armor item that can be equipped by the player.
Armor(String, String, String, Itemtype, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse model.items.equipments.Armor
Creates a new armor item with the specified properties and defense value.
ARMOR - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.items.equipments.EquipmentSlot
Slot for body armor such as chestplates or clothing.
ARMOR - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.items.Itemtype
Protective body equipment (e.g., armor, chestplates).
ArrowPanel - Klasse in view.utils
A custom panel that displays an arrow image.
ArrowPanel(String, boolean) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.utils.ArrowPanel
Creates a new ArrowPanel with the specified image path and selection state.
attack(Enemy) - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Attacks the specified enemy, calculating damage based on weapon and enemy defense.
attack(Player) - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Enemy
Attacks the specified player, dealing damage based on defense calculation.
AttackSelectionDialog - Klasse in view.battle
A dialog that allows the player to select an enemy target during a battle.
audio - Package audio
